name: Apple-Glazed Roast Pork- Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork roast with salt and pepper.
2. Use a broiler to brown the pork roast and remove excess fat; drain well.
3. Place apple quarters at the bottom of the crockpot.
4. Put the pork roast on top of the apples.
5. Mix apple juice, brown sugar, and ginger together.
6. Spoon the mixture over the surface of the pork roast, moistening it well.
7. Cover and cook on Low setting for 10 to 12 hours or until fully cooked.
